description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 1st (1st), 3rd (2nd), or 5th (3rd) Slot none; Price 750 gp (1st), 3,000 gp (2nd), 6,750 gp (3rd); Weight â DESCRIPTION This magical jewel glows like faerie fire, shedding light as a candle. It acts as a pearl of power, except it only allows a kitsune to recover a spent use of a spell-like ability of the appropriate spell level. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must be a kitsune; Cost 365 gp (1st), 1,500 gp (2nd), or 3,375 gp (3rd)
